description: CompositionRed round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove immediately Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Wear this red tee from tantra and the world willl know that the queen of Cool has arrived! Advertise your cool attitude in this comfortable t-shirt with style. Pair it with jeans, shorts or capris for that uber cool look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
